title: run -P: TOCTOU in port allocation: bind: address already in use
body:
The local port allocated with `run -P` seems unsafe when multiple jobs start at once:
```
$ podman [options] run --name portcheck -dt -P --health-cmd curl -f http://localhost/ quay.io/libpod/alpine_nginx:latest
Error: rootlessport listen tcp 0.0.0.0:43185: bind: address already in use
```
And it's not just rootless:
```
# podman [options] run -dt -P --health-cmd curl -f http://localhost/ quay.io/libpod/alpine_nginx:latest
Error: cannot listen on the TCP port: listen tcp4 :42611: bind: address already in use
```
In both cases the ports had been grabbed by a different `nginx` test.

From my look last night I think this is a podman/rootlessport bug, not something that can be fixed in e2e tests. So even though this is infrequent, it's something that can probably manifest in the field.

* fedora-38 : int podman fedora-38 root host boltdb
    * [05-18-2023 14:08](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6453053784588288/html/int-podman-fedora-38-root-host-boltdb.log.html#t--podman-container-port-l-nginx--1) in podman container port  -l nginx
* fedora-38 : int podman fedora-38 rootless host sqlite
    * [06-28 18:38](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/4611663630958592/html/int-podman-fedora-38-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-port-podman-port-nginx-by-name--1) in Podman port podman port nginx by name

comments.body: You are correct this is a race within podman. The current flow is allocate the ports once on container creation which obviously leads to race conditions with other processes. It is a long standing issue: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/10205#issuecomment-1010055023
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Two recent ones

* debian-13 : int remote debian-13 root host sqlite [remote]
  * PR #23751
    * [08-26-2024 08:57](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6737775217606656/html/int-remote-debian-13-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-port-podman-port--l-port-nginx--1) in Podman port podman port -l port nginx
* fedora-40 : int remote fedora-40 root host sqlite [remote]
  * PR #24450
    * [11-01 20:39](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/4576506729463808/html/int-remote-fedora-40-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-kube-play-test-with-reserved-PublishAll-annotation-in-yaml--1) in Podman kube play test with reserved PublishAll annotation in yaml
* rawhide : int podman rawhide root host sqlite
  * PR #24438
    * [10-31 23:04](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5492168138162176/html/int-podman-rawhide-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-kube-play-test-with-reserved-PublishAll-annotation-in-yaml--1) in Podman kube play test with reserved PublishAll annotation in yaml
